derive.title: Export controls
derive.detail: Boards may export source while remaining read-only live board mounts. Export Output stays a visible placeholder until transformed-output flows exist.
derive.sourceSummary: Export Source available for the mounted live board path.
derive.outputExplanation: Export Output is reserved for a future transformed-output flow. Boards currently export the source file only.

derive.title: Export controls
derive.detail: Export Source is the active outbound path in v1. Export Output remains distinct and visible as a placeholder, not as save behavior.
derive.sourceSummary: Export Source available or conditional for the mounted cartridge source.
derive.outputSummary: Export Output placeholder visible but disabled.
derive.outputExplanation: Export Output will later package rendered or transformed output. In v1, only source export is implemented.

derive.title: Export controls
derive.detail: Export controls activate when a mounted source exposes outbound export behavior.
derive.outputExplanation: Export Output explanation becomes active when a mounted source is present.

guardrails: Export Source is outbound download behavior, not terminal save persistence.
Export Output remains distinct from Save even while disabled as a placeholder.
Placeholder explanations may clarify disabled export output without enabling it.
Boards may export source while remaining read-only and outside terminal/saves/.
